00030 /*
00031  * Attachment code for having the generic console device use the LAMEbus
00032  * screen device.
00033  */
00034 
00035 #include <types.h>
00036 #include <lib.h>
00037 #include <generic/console.h>
00038 #include <lamebus/lscreen.h>
00039 #include "autoconf.h"
00040 
00041 struct con_softc *
00042 attach_con_to_lscreen(int consno, struct lscreen_softc *ls)
00043 {
00044         struct con_softc *cs = kmalloc(sizeof(struct con_softc));
00045         if (cs==NULL) {
00046                 return NULL;
00047         }
00048 
00049         cs->cs_devdata = ls;
00050         cs->cs_send = lscreen_write;
00051         cs->cs_sendpolled = lscreen_write;
00052         cs->cs_startpolling = NULL;
00053         cs->cs_endpolling = NULL;
00054 
00055         ls->ls_devdata = cs;
00056         ls->ls_start = con_start;
00057         ls->ls_input = con_input;
00058 
00059         return cs;
00060 }
00061
